# Skolyoz Serisi — Derleme (2026-06-07)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Altered Lower-Limb Dynamics in Stop-Jump Activity of Adolescents With Major Thoracic Scoliosis.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik altered lower-limb dynamics in stop-jump activity of adolescents with major thoracic skolyoz. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of applied biomechanics. 2026 jun 4. Anahtar kavramlar: altered, lower, limb, dynamics, stop, jump.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42248434/

### 1-2 Level Lateral Single Position Surgery is Highly Cost-Effective in the Treatment of Surgically Indicated Degenerative Lumbar Spinal Pathology.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik 1-2 level lateral single position surgery is highly cost-effective in the treatment of surgically indicated degenerative lomber (bel bölgesi) spinal pathology. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: the spine journal : official journal of the north american spine society. 2026 jun 2. Anahtar kavramlar: spine, journal, level, lateral, single, position.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42235689/

### Relationship between idiopathic scoliosis and body composition -a case-control study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik relationship between idiopathic skolyoz and body composition -a case-control study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: frontiers in physiology. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: relationship, between, idiopathic, skolyoz, body, composition.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42222291/

### Biomechanical characteristics and therapeutic effects of Traditional Chinese Medicine manual therapy in adolescent idiopathic scoliosis: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik biomechanical characteristics and therapeutic effects of traditional chinese medicine manuel terapi in adolescent idiopathic skolyoz: study protocol for a randomize controlled klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: frontiers in medicine. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: medicine, biomechanical, characteristics, therapeutic, effects, traditional.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42221125/

### The dose-response relationship between physical activity and school scoliosis screening positive in children and adolescents: a preliminary cross-sectional study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik the dose-response relationship between physical activity and school skolyoz screening positive in children and adolescents: a preliminary cross-sectional study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: frontiers in pediatrics. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: dose, response, relationship, between, physical, activity.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42221003/
